mapper.sql: br.id, br.record_no, br.user_id, br.book_id, br.borrow_date, br.due_date, br.return_date, br.status, br.renew_count, br.fine_amount, br.fine_status, br.remark, br.create_time, br.update_time, u.username, u.real_name, u.reader_no, b.title as book_title, b.isbn as book_isbn
mapper.select: SELECT FROM borrow_record br LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON br.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 WHERE br.deleted = 0 AND br.id = #{id}

SELECT FROM borrow_record br LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON br.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 WHERE br.deleted = 0 AND br.user_id = #{userId} AND br.status IN (0, 2) ORDER BY br.borrow_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_id = #{userId} AND status IN (0, 2)

SELECT FROM borrow_record br LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON br.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 WHERE br.deleted = 0 AND br.status = 0 AND br.due_date < NOW()
mapper.update:
UPDATE borrow_record SET status = 2, update_time = NOW() WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 0 AND due_date < NOW() AND id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(borrow_date, '%Y-%m') as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM borrow_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND borrow_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(borrow_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT DATE(borrow_date) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM borrow_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND borrow_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(borrow_date) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT b.id as bookId, b.title as bookTitle, b.author as author, COUNT(br.id) as borrowCount FROM borrow_record br LEFT JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0 WHERE br.deleted = 0 GROUP BY b.id, b.title, b.author ORDER BY borrowCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT u.id as userId, u.username as username, u.real_name as realName, u.reader_no as readerNo, COUNT(br.id) as borrowCount FROM borrow_record br LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON br.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE br.deleted = 0 GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.real_name, u.reader_no ORDER BY borrowCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalBorrows, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN (0, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as activeBorrows, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as overdueCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as returnedCount, COALESCE(SUM(fine_amount), 0) as totalFine FROM borrow_record WHERE deleted = 0
